## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands or checks you ran.

## Release Readiness

- [ ] Updated user-facing docs for behavior or API changes.
- [ ] Updated `LICENSE-3rdparty.csv` when dependencies or vendored code changed.
- [ ] Confirmed no secrets, credentials, or internal-only details were added.
- [ ] Confirmed security-sensitive behavior was tested or explicitly marked not applicable.
